headline: Strength in Danaher's Biotechnology Unit Seems Firm: More Upside Ahead?
summary: DHR's Biotechnology segment posts 7% core revenue growth as bioprocessing demand stayed strong and equipment orders jumped despite headwinds.

headline: Pall to Address a Key Decarbonization Challenge with Additively Manufactured Filtration
summary: Pall Corporation, a Danaher company and advanced filtration leader, has been awarded $1 million CAD from the Government of Alberta through Emissions Reduction Alberta (ERA) to accelerate development of an additively manufactured flue-gas filtration solution designed to overcome pre-treatment bottlenecks and improve the reliability of carbon capture under real-world conditions. headline: Why The Narrative Around Danaher (DHR) Is Shifting With Bioprocess Recovery And Masimo Deal
summary: Danaher’s fair value estimate has been trimmed slightly from US$250.14 per share to US$247.83 per share, a small move that still matters if you are tracking entry points and valuation discipline. That shift sits against a backdrop of mixed analyst commentary, where some see improving bioprocess conditions and portfolio moves as supportive, while others focus on timing risks and the impact of recent target cuts. As you read on, you will see how these changing views fit together and what to...
